top_signals.title: As Putin-Xi meet, Iran war energy disruption puts long-stalled Russian gas pipeline back on agenda
top_signals.summary: Putin is expected to hold talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping on Wednesday, with the long-stalled Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline topping the agenda.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
